parameters.jsCode: const h=$json.headers||{}; const size=Number(h['content-length']||h['Content-Length']||0); const mime=String(h['content-type']||h['Content-Type']||'').split(';')[0].trim().toLowerCase(); const ok=['image/jpeg','image/jpg','image/png','image/webp']; if(!ok.includes(mime)) return [{json:{valid:false,reason:'unsupported_mime',mime,size}}]; if(Number.isFinite(size)&&size>10*1024*1024) return [{json:{valid:false,reason:'image_too_large',mime,size}}]; return [{json:{valid:true,mime,size}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $env.OPENAI_VISION_MODEL || 'gpt-4o-mini', temperature: 0.1, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: [ { type: 'text', text: 'You are a strict invoice extraction engine. Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown. No prose. JSON schema: { supplier?: string, invoice_date?: string, items:[{ raw_name:string, quantity:number, unit:string, unit_price:number, total:number, barcode?:string|null, is_promotion?:boolean, confidence:number }], overall_confidence:number }. Rules: confidence 0-100. quantity/unit_price/total numeric. overall_confidence 0-100.' } ] }, { role: 'user', content: [ { type: 'text', text: `supplier_hint=${$('Validate Input').item.json.supplier_hint || ''}; extract invoice lines now.` }, { type: 'image_url', image_url: { url: $('Validate Input').item.json.image_url } } ] } ] } }}

parameters.jsCode: const raw=$json?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content||''; let parsed; try{parsed=JSON.parse(raw);}catch(e){return [{json:{valid:false,reason:'invalid_json_from_llm',raw_output:raw}}];} if(!Array.isArray(parsed.items)) return [{json:{valid:false,reason:'missing_items_array',raw_output:raw}}]; const n=(v,d=0)=>{const x=Number(v); return Number.isFinite(x)?x:d;}; const b=(v)=>v===true||String(v).toLowerCase()==='true'||String(v)==='1'; const items=parsed.items.map((it,idx)=>({ line_number:idx+1, supplier_item_code:String(it.raw_name||`item_${idx+1}`).slice(0,200), item_name:String(it.raw_name||'Unknown Item').slice(0,500), quantity:n(it.quantity,0), unit:String(it.unit||''), unit_price:n(it.unit_price,0), total_amount:n(it.total,n(it.quantity,0)*n(it.unit_price,0)), is_promotion:b(it.is_promotion||false), barcode:it.barcode?String(it.barcode):null, confidence_score:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,n(it.confidence,0))) })); const overall=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,n(parsed.overall_confidence,0))); const ctx=$('Validate Input').item.json; const parsed_invoice={ supplier_name:String(parsed.supplier||ctx.supplier_hint||'UNKNOWN_SUPPLIER'), supplier_code:String(parsed.supplier||ctx.supplier_hint||'UNKNOWN_SUPPLIER'), invoice_number:null, invoice_date:parsed.invoice_date||new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), items, total_bill_amount:items.reduce((s,i)=>s+Number(i.total_amount||0),0), raw_source:'image', llm_overall_confidence:overall }; return [{json:{valid:true,parsed_invoice,overall_confidence:overall}}];

const ctx=$('Validate Input').item.json; const overall=Number($json.overall_confidence||0); const elapsed=Math.max(0,Date.now()-Number(ctx.started_at||Date.now())); let status='processing'; let decision='proceed'; if(overall<60){status='failed';decision='resend_image';} else if(overall<85){status='needs_review';decision='draft_required';} return [{json:{...ctx,...$json,status_to_save:status,decision,processing_time_ms:elapsed,parsed_data_sql:JSON.stringify($json.parsed_invoice).replace(/'/g, "''")}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO invoice_log (zalo_user_id,zalo_msg_id,supplier_code,source_type,source_url,parsed_data,status,llm_confidence,processing_time_ms,created_at) VALUES ('{{$json.zalo_user_id}}','{{$json.zalo_msg_id}}','{{$json.parsed_invoice.supplier_code.replace(/'/g, "''")}}','image','{{$json.image_url.replace(/'/g, "''")}}','{{$json.parsed_data_sql}}'::jsonb,'{{$json.status_to_save}}',{{$json.overall_confidence}},{{$json.processing_time_ms}},NOW()) ON CONFLICT (zalo_user_id, zalo_msg_id) WHERE zalo_msg_id IS NOT NULL DO UPDATE SET source_type='image',source_url=EXCLUDED.source_url,parsed_data=EXCLUDED.parsed_data,status=EXCLUDED.status,llm_confidence=EXCLUDED.llm_confidence,processing_time_ms=EXCLUDED.processing_time_ms;

INSERT INTO invoice_log (zalo_user_id,zalo_msg_id,supplier_code,source_type,source_url,parsed_data,status,error_details,llm_confidence,processing_time_ms,created_at) VALUES ('{{$("Validate Input").item.json.zalo_user_id}}','{{$("Validate Input").item.json.zalo_msg_id}}','UNKNOWN_SUPPLIER','image','{{$("Validate Input").item.json.image_url.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',jsonb_build_object('error','vision_parse_failed'),'failed','{{$json.reason || "invalid_input_or_llm_json"}}',0,0,NOW()) ON CONFLICT (zalo_user_id,zalo_msg_id) WHERE zalo_msg_id IS NOT NULL DO UPDATE SET status='failed',error_details=EXCLUDED.error_details,source_url=EXCLUDED.source_url;

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{status:'failed',decision:'resend_image',message:'Ảnh chưa rõ hoặc không đúng định dạng. Sếp gửi lại ảnh rõ hơn giúp em nhé.'}}];
